meta.title: How Should the U.S. Roll Back and Defeat the Islamic State?
meta.description: Hudson Institute hosted a panel of experts who witnessed the 2007 surge up close and will assess both the nature of the current Sunni insurgency and the options going forward. Hudson Institute Senior Fellow Lee Smith  moderated a panel featuring Michael Doran, Kimberly Kagan, Michael Pregent, and Joel Rayburn. - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
